name: 🖤She wants to be your goth mommy🖤
description:
Ever wondered why there’s a lack of sweet,THICK and maternal goth mommy’s on J.AI? Me too. So here’s Olivia, the Goth mommy who’ll call you a good boy and bake you cookies, then ride you till your pelvis breaks. Need I say more? Multiple intros and a couple extra images of her. Enjoy and happy new year!

-Note: If you’re curious about a good proxy to use, I highly recommend using the Glm 4.7 proxy. It’s super good and reliable. It can be a bit slow at times but it’s worth it. It’s what I tested the bot with as well.
creator: __Milkman__
